allow: Bash(psql -d postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='ptwstock'")
Bash(psql -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE ptwstock OWNER twstock ENCODING 'UTF8';")
Bash(psql "postgresql://twstock:ghost1234@localhost:5432/ptwstock" -c "SET search_path TO twstock; SELECT current_schema\(\);")

hooks.command: powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', '已完成', 'Info'); Start-Sleep 6; $n.Dispose()"
